items.title: Vikings hire Andrew Healy, Trent Kirchner as assistant GMs
items.summary: The Vikings are hiring Andrew Healy and Trent Kirchner as assistant General Managers under new General Manager Nolan Teasley, Alec Lewis of TheAthletic.com reports.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Socceroos begin World Cup adventure with underdog status left behind
items.summary: In a super-sized edition that makes Australia a middle power their young squad can budget for four matches at the tournament with the hope of more ⚽️ How to watch the Socceroos...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'Mummy hundred' gives Wyatt-Hodge her deserved day in the sun
items.summary: Danni Wyatt-Hodge gives England's T20 World Cup campaign lift-off with a 'mummy hundred', writes Matthew Henry.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
